title: Arthrocereus damazioi
taxonomy: Arthrocereus damazioi is classified within the family of cacti, Cactaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Cactoideae and the tribe Cacteae. The species Arthrocereus damazioi is also categorized under the genus Arthrocereus, which is a group of epiphytic cacti. More specifically, it is a species of flowering plant in the order Caryophyllales. This classification provides a comprehensive understanding of the plant's relationships within the botanical world.
